name: MiniCPM-Llama3-V 2.5
license: MiniCPM Model License (custom; free for research and, after registration, commercial use) + Apache-2.0 code
note: First end-side 8B MLLM to reach GPT-4V level, surpassing Gemini Pro and Claude 3 on OpenCompass (65.1 avg).
verificationNotes: Confirmed real, independently re-fetched HF model card (openbmb/MiniCPM-Llama3-V-2_5): 8B params (SigLip-400M + Llama3-8B-Instruct), MiniCPM Model License weights / Apache-2.0 code, released 2024-05-20 as stated on the model card. Context length confirmed as 8192 (8k) directly from config.json max_position_embeddings, correcting an unverified assumption to a directly-confirmed primary-source value. OpenCompass 65.1 average score confirmed present verbatim on the HF model card.
